landing.hero_subtitle: A modular manufacturing management platform that adapts to your business. No unnecessary features — only what you truly need.
landing.features_subtitle: Modular architecture — pay only for what you use. Expandable anytime.
landing.feat_workforce_desc: Employee scheduling, attendance tracking, overtime management
landing.feat_tracking_desc: Real-time product and batch tracking across the production line
landing.feat_fleet_desc: Vehicle mileage, fuel consumption and fleet operations tracking
landing.feat_performance_desc: Manufacturing efficiency metrics with target-based analysis
landing.feat_scheduling_desc: Production line capacity scheduling and resource allocation
landing.feat_oee_desc: Overall Equipment Effectiveness: Availability × Performance × Quality
landing.feat_maintenance_desc: Preventive maintenance scheduling, alerts and asset management
landing.feat_quality_desc: Inspections, defect tracking, 8D reports and compliance
landing.usp_premise_desc: Deploy on your own server (GDPR compliant) or run in the cloud — your choice.
landing.usp_config_desc: Everything configurable from the admin panel: units, formats, imports, permissions.
landing.usp_lang_desc: English, Hungarian, German built-in. Custom translations editable from admin.
landing.pricing_subtitle: Fixed monthly fee — no per-user pricing.
landing.pricing_disclaimer: Prices are indicative, net, in EUR. Final pricing is based on individual needs assessment.
landing.impl_includes: Includes: installation, configuration, 2 hours online training, 30 days email support.
landing.cta_subtitle: Enter your email and try the Basic package free for 30 days.
landing.cta_thanks: Thank you! We'll be in touch shortly.

sap.title: SAP Integration
sap.description: SAP ECC / S/4HANA data exchange — RFC, OData and file-based sync. RFC activation requires node-rfc package.
sap.how_to_activate: How to activate the SAP connection?
sap.step_rfc: RFC: npm install node-rfc + SAP NetWeaver RFC SDK (download: support.sap.com)
sap.step_odata: OData: SAP BTP API Hub URL and OAuth token in connection configuration
sap.step_mappings: Define field mappings (SAP field → ACI table/field)
sap.password_ref_hint: If the password is stored in the SAP_PROD_PASSWORD env variable, enter that here — NOT the password itself!
sap.confirm_delete_connection: Are you sure you want to delete this connection? Associated mappings will also be deleted.
sap.no_connections_hint: Click the "New SAP connection" button to configure
sap.mapping_subtitle: SAP field → ACI field conversion rules
sap.no_mappings_hint: Mappings define which SAP table field maps to which ACI table/field.
